pokemon:seedot.name: Seedot
pokemon:seedot.summary: Seedot looks exactly like an acorn when it is dangling from a tree branch. It startles other Pokémon by suddenly moving. This Pokémon polishes its body once a day using leaves.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Seedot looks exactly like an acorn when it is dangling from a tree branch. It startles other Pokémon by suddenly moving. This Pokémon polishes its body once a day using leaves.
When it dangles from a tree branch, it looks just like an acorn. It enjoys scaring other Pokémon.
When it dangles from a tree branch, it looks just like an acorn. It enjoys scaring other Pokémon.
When it dangles from a tree branch, it looks just like an acorn. It enjoys scaring other Pokémon.
It hangs off branches and absorbs nutrients. When it finishes eating, its body becomes so heavy that it drops to the ground with a thump.
If it remains still, it becomes impossible to distinguish from real nuts. It delights in surprising foraging PIDGEY.
It attaches itself to a tree branch using the top of its head. Strong winds can sometimes make it fall.
If it remains still, it becomes impossible to distinguish from real nuts. It delights in surprising foraging PIDGEY.
Seedot attaches itself to a tree branch using the top of its head. It sucks moisture from the tree while hanging off the branch. The more water it drinks, the glossier this Pokémon’s body becomes.
When it dangles from a tree branch, it looks just like an acorn. It enjoys scaring other Pokémon.
When it dangles from a tree branch, it looks just like an acorn. It enjoys scaring other Pokémon.
SEEDOT attaches itself to a tree branch using the top of its head. It sucks moisture from the tree while hanging off the branch. The more water it drinks, the glossier this POKéMON’s body becomes.
SEEDOT looks exactly like an acorn when it is dangling from a tree branch. It startles other POKéMON by suddenly moving. This POKéMON polishes its body once a day using leaves.
It attaches itself to a tree branch using the top of its head. Strong winds can sometimes make it fall.
It attaches itself to a tree branch using the top of its head. Strong winds can sometimes make it fall.
If it remains still, it looks just like a real nut. It delights in surprising foraging Pokémon.
When it dangles from a tree branch, it looks just like an acorn. It enjoys scaring other Pokémon.
When it dangles from a tree branch, it looks just like an acorn. It enjoys scaring other Pokémon.
It attaches itself to a tree branch using the top of its head. Strong winds can sometimes make it fall.
When it dangles from a tree branch, it looks just like an acorn. It enjoys scaring other Pokémon.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Seedot looks exactly like an acorn when it is dangling from a tree branch. It startles other Pokémon by suddenly moving. This Pokémon polishes its body once a day using leaves.

pokemon:nuzleaf.name: Nuzleaf
pokemon:nuzleaf.summary: This Pokémon pulls out the leaf on its head and makes a flute with it. The sound of Nuzleaf’s flute strikes fear and uncertainty in the hearts of people lost in a forest.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This Pokémon pulls out the leaf on its head and makes a flute with it. The sound of Nuzleaf’s flute strikes fear and uncertainty in the hearts of people lost in a forest.
The sound of its grass flute makes its listeners uneasy. It lives deep in forests.
The sound of its grass flute makes its listeners uneasy. It lives deep in forests.
The sound of its grass flute makes its listeners uneasy. It lives deep in forests.
A forest-dwelling POKéMON that is skilled at climbing trees. Its long and pointed nose is its weak point. It loses power if the nose is gripped.
They live in holes bored in large trees. The sound of NUZLEAF’s grass flute fills listeners with dread.
It lives deep in forests. With the leaf on its head, it makes a flute whose song makes listeners uneasy.
They live in holes bored in large trees. The sound of NUZLEAF’s grass flute fills listeners with dread.
Nuzleaf live in densely overgrown forests. They occasionally venture out of the forest to startle people. This Pokémon dislikes having its long nose pinched.
The sound of its grass flute makes its listeners uneasy. It lives deep in forests.
The sound of its grass flute makes its listeners uneasy. It lives deep in forests.
NUZLEAF live in densely overgrown forests. They occasionally venture out of the forest to startle people. This POKéMON dislikes having its long nose pinched.
This POKéMON pulls out the leaf on its head and makes a flute with it. The sound of NUZLEAF’s flute strikes fear and uncertainty in the hearts of people lost in a forest.
They live in holes bored in large trees. The sound of Nuzleaf’s grass flute fills listeners with dread.
It lives deep in forests. With the leaf on its head, it makes a flute whose song makes listeners uneasy.

pokemon:shiftry.name: Shiftry
pokemon:shiftry.summary: Shiftry’s large fans generate awesome gusts of wind at a speed close to 100 feet per second. The whipped-up wind blows anything away. This Pokémon chooses to live quietly deep in forests.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Shiftry’s large fans generate awesome gusts of wind at a speed close to 100 feet per second. The whipped-up wind blows anything away. This Pokémon chooses to live quietly deep in forests.
By flapping its leafy fan, it can whip up gusts of 100 ft/second that can level houses.
By flapping its leafy fan, it can whip up gusts of 100 ft/second that can level houses.
By flapping its leafy fan, it can whip up gusts of 100 ft/second that can level houses.
It is said to arrive on chilly, wintry winds. Feared from long ago as the guardian of forests, this POKéMON lives in a deep forest where people do not venture.
A POKéMON that was feared as a forest guardian. It can read the foe’s mind and take preemptive action.
It lives quietly in the deep forest. It is said to create chilly winter winds with the fans it holds.
A POKéMON that was feared as a forest guardian. It can read the foe’s mind and take preemptive action.
Shiftry is a mysterious Pokémon that is said to live atop towering trees dating back over a thousand years. It creates terrific windstorms with the fans it holds.
By flapping its leafy fan, it can whip up gusts of 100 ft/second that can level houses.
By flapping its leafy fan, it can whip up gusts of 100 ft/second that can level houses.
SHIFTRY is a mysterious POKéMON that is said to live atop towering trees dating back over a thousand years. It creates terrific windstorms with the fans it holds.
SHIFTRY’s large fans generate awesome gusts of wind at a speed close to 100 feet per second. The whipped-up wind blows anything away. This POKéMON chooses to live quietly deep in forests.
It lives quietly in the deep forest. It is said to create chilly winter winds with the fans it holds.
